Tip of the Day
Skill levels exceeding a recipe's main skill requirement in the crafting interface provide additional Crafting outcome.

Plains foraging

Plains foraging
Main Skill: Foraging
Max Efficiency: 160%

With each gentle stride across the plains, you immerse yourself in the natural abundance, gathering wild berries, seeds, and tender shoots that thrive in the soil beneath your feet.

The Plains foraging activity is a Foraging activity.

Locations

This activity can be done at the following locations:

  • Casbrant Fields in Jarvonia
  • Norsack Plains in Jarvonia

Visibility

This activity is always visible.

Requirement

Skill Level Requirements:

  • At least Foraging lvl. 10.

Experience Information

Skills Base

Steps 		Base

Steps 		Max

Each of the secondary drops is rolled independently of the others.
